  • Probability

How many 6 of diamonds in a deck of 52 cards?

Asked by Anonymous

There is only 1 in each deck.

There are 4 '6s' in total:

- 6 of hearts

- 6 of clubs

- 6 of spades

- 6 of diamonds

  • Drama and Acting

Is Emma Stone and Jennifer stone sister?

Asked by Anonymous

No. Jennifer Stone is an only daughter. She has no sisters. She has one brother and that's it. Even tho you may see some slight resemblance between the two, there is no relation.

Where is Radha Soami Satsang Beas Centre in Hyderabad?

Asked by Anonymous

As per my knowledge - there are two satsang ghar - (1) in Moinabad , which is the biggest one (2) in Himayat Nagar, near chatni's returant

  • Mobile Phones
  • Preguntas en Espanol
  • English to Spanish

How do you ask for a phone number in Spanish?

Asked by Anonymous

It means 'What is your telephone number?'

If you have one, and want to give it, you can simply give the number by digits:

0 - cero (THEYraw) (TH as in 'thin')

1 - uno (OOnaw)

2 - dos (thoss) (th as in 'then')

3 - tres - trace

4 - cuatro (CWATraw)

5 - cinco (THEENGcaw)

6 - seis (SAYss)

7 - siete (see-ETTay)

8 - ocho (OCHaw)

9 - nueve (noo-AYvay)

Where is the flasher relay on a 1992 LeBaron?

Asked by Anonymous

FRONT SEATING AREA, DRIVER SIDE, UNDER DASH, MOUNTED ABOVE STEERING COLUMN.

  • Motorcycle Law

Do you have to have a motorcycle license to operate a motorcycle in Alabama?

Asked by Anonymous

Alabama does not require a motor vehicle dealer license to sell motorcycles. They are classed with bicycles and only a business license and sales tax ID are required.

DanV

  • Flower Gardening
  • Botany or Plant Biology

What flower is found on every continent?

Asked by Anonymous

The dandelion is a type of flower that can be found on every continent. It is a hardy plant that thrives in a variety of climates and conditions, allowing it to grow almost anywhere in the world.

  • Reference Books

Have you ever used HashTable and Directory?

Asked by Anonymous

Dictionary is super class to HashTable and Properties class.

=>this class provides abstract functions and used to store and retrieve the objects by using key-value pair..

Hash Table:

A hash table indexes and store the objects in a dictionary using hash codes as the object's keys.

=>Hash codes are the integer values,that identifying by objects.

  • Food & Cooking

Why is garlic sticky when peeled and chopped?

Asked by Carlie Renner

Garlic is sticky when peeled and chopped because it contains sulfur compounds that react with enzymes in the garlic, creating a sticky substance called allicin.

  • Bees and Beekeeping

What country has the most bees?

Asked by Anonymous

Turkey is estimated to have the largest number of beehives in the world, with over 7 million, making it one of the countries with the most bees.

  • Trigonometry

What is the degrees and the hypotenues to a right triangle in trigonometry when the opposite is 14 and the adjacent is 20?

Asked by Anonymous

The length of the hypotenuse would be approximately 24.41 and the angle, theta, would be approximately 35.

5w-30

dino oil or synthetic. Follow the Oil Life Management system on the truck as described in the manual.

  • Factoring and Multiples

What is the greatest common factor of 3675 and 882?

Asked by Anonymous

The greatest common factor (GCF) is often also called the greatest common divisor (GCD) or highest common factor (HCF). Keep in mind that these different terms all refer to the same thing: the largest integer which evenly divides two or more numbers.

The greatest common factor of 882 and 3675 is 147

What is a six letter word for a shoe?

Asked by Anonymous

loafer

  • Mortgages

Where could mortgage refinance with no closing costs be found?

Asked by Anonymous

You can normally refinance your mortgage with no closing fee if you can manage to renegotiate a mortgage with your existing lender. Otherwise, you can try asking in forums for the latest deals and reading blogs. Review sites are also helpful.

When did Toni Blum die?

  • Idioms, Cliches, and Slang

What is the meaning of 'Don't put all your eggs in one basket'?

Asked by Anonymous

It is an idiomatic phrase meaning that one should not focus all his or her resources on one hope, possibility or avenue of success or just one person. If that one person fails you than you will be "broken" and left with nothing/no eggs. It is a proverb that warns against pinning all your hopes on one course of action. If you put all your eggs in one basket and then drop the basket, you will break all your eggs. Similarly, if you pin all your hopes on one course of action and it fails, then you are left with no recourse.

If you put all of your eggs in one basket when you are ready to sell them, then if anything happens to the basket, all the eggs will be gone. Therefore, it is best to put the eggs into several different baskets for safekeeping - or, best to put your money or time or investment into several different things.

Putting all your eggs in one basket means in most cases: investing all of your resource or money into one thing. The comparison is that if you put all of your eggs into one basket and something happens to the basket such as you dropping it, all of your eggs break and you have nothing left compared to distributing your eggs into two or more baskets so if something happens to the one, you still have your others eggs. If you invest all of your money into one company and the company fails, you have lost all of your money. Don't put all of your eggs in one basket.

If you put all your eggs in one basket, you risk everything on a single opportunity which, like eggs breaking, could go wrong.

It means putting all of ones hopes into one outcome. Example sentences: He tried out for both the football team and the cross country team, that way he didn't have all his eggs in one basket. My heart is set on going to Weslyn college, but I applied to four different schools to avoid having all my eggs in one basket. If Weslyn doesn't work out, I'm sure to attend college someplace else.

Spread you assets or eggs or anything else of value. Then you have a few baskets, if you drop one its not so important.

If all the eggs were in one basket, think what might happen if that basket were to somehow fall away or otherwise break. If the eggs are in two or more baskets, even if one basket breaks, you can still make it home with eggs.

In modern times, this idiom is best seen as the investment concept of diversification. The idea is to spread (diversify) your risk across several non-related areas. That way, if one of those areas turns sour (say a company goes bankrupt), it doesn't result in a you losing everything; you can keep going with your remaining investments.

It means to concentrate your bets, putting yourself in line for either a huge payoff or big losses. If you put "all your money in one wallet," your money is either completely safe from theft, or it's all gone because someone found and stole it.
It is an idiomatic phrase meaning that one should not focus all his or her resources on one hope, possibility or avenue of success.

If you put all of your eggs in one basket when you are ready to sell them, if anything happens to the basket, all the eggs will be gone. Therefore, it is best to put the eggs into several different baskets for safekeeping - or, best to put your money or time or investment into several different things.

Putting all your eggs in one basket means in most cases: investing all of your money into one thing. The comparison is that if you put all of your eggs into one basket and something happens to the basket such as you dropping it, all of your eggs break and you have nothing left compared to distributing your eggs into two or more baskets so if something happens to the one, you still have your others eggs. If you invest all of your money into one company and the company fails, you have lost all of your money. Don't put all of your eggs in one basket.

"Don't put all your eggs in one basket" is a proverb that warns against pinning all your hopes on one course of action. If you put all your eggs in one basket and then drop the basket, you will break all your eggs. Similarly, if you pin all your hopes on one course of action and it fails, then you are left with no recourse.

If you put all your eggs in one basket, you risk everything on a single opportunity which, like eggs breaking, could go wrong.

putting all of ones hopes into one outcome example sentences: He tried out for both the football team and the cross country team, that way he didn't have all his eggs in one basket. My heart is set on going to Weston college, but I applied to four different schools to avoid having all my eggs in one basket. If Weston doesn't work out, I'm sure to attend college someplace else.

Spread you assets or eggs or anything else of value. Then you have a few baskets, if you drop one its not so important.
Putting all your eggs in one basket means in most cases: investing all of your money into one thing. The comparison is that if you put all of your eggs into one basket and something happens to the basket such as you dropping it, all of your eggs break and you have nothing left compared to distributing your eggs into two or more baskets so if something happens to the one, you still have your others eggs. If you invest all of your money into one company and the company fails, you have lost all of your money. Don't put all of your eggs in one basket.

How much is 2 ounces of tofu?

Asked by Anonymous

4 tablespoons

  • Nutrition

How long can a person go without food and water?

Asked by Anonymous

The old rule on it this is:

A person can go up to four weeks without food.

As much as four days without water.

No more than four minutes without air.

  • Business Accounting and Bookkeeping

Which is NOT a way that an entrepreneur could increase the contribution margin or profit of each unit sold?

Asked by Anonymous

One way an entrepreneur cannot increase the contribution margin or profit of each unit sold is by increasing variable costs, such as production or material expenses. Higher variable costs directly reduce the contribution margin, as they increase the cost associated with each unit sold. Instead, entrepreneurs should focus on reducing these costs or increasing the selling price to improve profitability.

Asked by Anonymous

George Burt
